name: New Hampshire Maple Syrup Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine syrup, hot water, and butter in a saucepan over medium heat until boiling.
2. In a separate bowl, mix cornstarch, salt, cold water to form a thin paste, add egg yolks, and beat well.
3. Gradually stir the hot syrup mixture into the cornstarch mixture while returning it to a boil. Cook, stirring constantly, until thickened.
4. Allow the filling to cool slightly before pouring it into a pre-cooked pie shell.
5. In another bowl, whip egg whites until stiff peaks form. Slowly fold in 1 teaspoon of maple syrup.
6. Spread the whipped mixture over the cooled filling and brown in a hot oven (about 350°F/175°C).
7. Optionally, sprinkle chopped nuts on top before baking.
